value.body:
## Context

Users need to understand whether repository ticket data is initialized, syncing, pushed, pulled, warning, failed, or local-only.

## Outcome

A status center exposes repository health, sync pointers, last operations, warnings, and recommended actions.

## Acceptance criteria

- Status center shows one row per registered repository with health, last sync, last push, warning count, and active snapshot.
- Users can trigger sync/push where safe and see progress/failure feedback.
- Status links to repository history and warning detail pages.
- Background bootstrap and remote operation states are represented accurately.
- Tests cover status mapping and user-triggered operation states.

frontmatter.title: Build a repository sync status center

value.title: Build a repository sync status center
